home.intro_text: Welcome to Rigger Pro. Our complete suite of advanced calculators is designed to facilitate the planning, execution, and safety of your rigging and lifting operations.
home.contact_us: If you wish to add or comment something, write to us at

install.title: 📲 Install Rigger Pro
install.intro: You can install this app on your phone and use it just like a regular app.

android.title: 📱 Android (Chrome / Edge)
android.step1: Open the app in your browser.

computer.title: 💻 Computer
computer.step1: Open the app in Chrome or Edge.
computer.step2: Look for the {icon} icon in the browser's address bar.

install.tip: ⚡ Once installed, the app will work like a normal app and you'll be able to use the calculators quickly.

dashboard.title: Intelligence Dashboard
dashboard.no_data: No lift data available. Go to the Standard or PRO tools to perform some calculations. Your rigging intelligence insights will appear here.
dashboard.warning_text_1: {target}% of your lifts used unsafe sling angles (< 45°).
dashboard.warning_text_2: Your lifts could significantly reduce hook and sling tension by using wider sling angles (60° recommended). Longer slings or lifting beams may be required.
dashboard.excellent_text_1: You consistently maintain safe sling angles (≥ 45°).
dashboard.excellent_text_2: This minimizes tension multipliers on your slinging gear.

auth.no_account: Don't have an account? Register here
auth.err_weak_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.err_operation_not_allowed: Email/Password authentication is NOT enabled in Firebase Console.
